summary:
SPIRITUAL DISCERNMENT AND ELDER COUNSEL: Brandon shares his practice of testing and judging spiritual messages to avoid being misled by familiar spirits, highlighting a recent conversation with Sister Billye regarding end-times revelations. He emphasizes the importance of surrounding himself with seasoned elders who have been associated with prominent figures like Smith Wigglesworth, Lester Sumrall, and Kenneth Hagin to ensure his prophetic words remain grounded and accurate.

CREATIVE MIRACLES AND ADAM'S LEASE: Brandon explains a divine transition from basic healing to top-tier creative miracles, where believers will witness supernatural events like the reversal of autism, Down syndrome, and severed limbs. He reveals that this shift is tied to the expiration of Adam's 6,000-year lease, an agreement made in the Garden of Eden, which will trigger a sudden global spiritual awakening and a massive transformation within a 24-hour window, accelerating heavily around the upcoming September and Rosh Hashanah timeframe.

GLOBAL DEVASTATION AND CELESTIAL THREATS: Brandon warns of extreme impending natural disasters, including a major volcanic eruption, the splitting of Japan, massive tsunamis, and severe fires emerging from gas lines in Alaska and Hawaii. He describes a vision of a massive space rock accompanied by smaller fragments traveling toward Earth, which governments, particularly China, are allegedly monitoring but hiding from the public. This celestial anomaly will supposedly cause extreme pressure on the Earth's crust, leading to severe earthquakes, magnetic pole shifts, and dramatic climate and tidal changes, particularly affecting Venice, Italy.

HEAVENLY PORTALS AND THE CLOUD OF WITNESSES: Brandon recounts powerful visions of heavenly realms where he completely lost track of time while basking in divine glory, comparing it to historical revivals with Oral Roberts. He describes seeing a portal featuring a great cloud of witnesses, including deceased intercessors like Sister Wilkerson, Lucy, and Brother Halverson, who are actively travailing and praying in heaven to birth a massive revival on Earth, specifically targeting Minnesota and the Living Word Church.

UPCOMING PLAGUE AND SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY: Brandon issues a stern warning about a new, highly destructive virus that will surpass the severity of COVID, describing the previous pandemic as merely a test run. He urges believers to act strictly like the Israelites during Passover by pleading the blood of Jesus over their households and standing firm in their spiritual authority to repel this demonic plague, stressing that true Christians must abandon any lukewarm faith to survive the incoming darkness and judgment.

WORLDWIDE HARVEST AND THE DESTRUCTION OF IDOLS: Brandon foresees an unprecedented global revival characterized by heaven and Earth colliding, resulting in explosive miracles and a massive harvest of souls across nations like Japan, Taiwan, and the Philippines. He specifically details a violent shaking coming to India and Buddhist regions, where literal pagan temples and false idols will be physically destroyed by earthquakes to pave the way for a massive influx of Christianity and divine glory, with major revival hotspots also igniting across multiple United States regions including Branson, Tulsa, and Florida.
rawData: [July 26, 2025]-[The Lord gave me a glimpse of heaven today - I could hear them singing with us]-[https://youtu.be/K06Rr9jtDEg]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me. It's always such a blessing that every single one of you would want to take your busy day and spend praying with me. And Diana is behind the camera today, and she said, "I want you to say hi, babe." "Hi, prayers. Hi, prayers." She's behind there. I get to look at her now instead of Braden today. He's been making shorts for us and getting the Spanish videos out and all the other—he said, "Daddy, I've got to translate all this stuff and get this over on these other channels." So, he's working, and so we're going to make this prayer video for you. He is busy trying to translate those videos for South Korea and all the beautiful people all around the world that need to hear the gospel. He works so hard. He does. I'm so proud of him. He's a good boy. But I got to talk to Sister Billye yesterday, and that was an amazing conversation about the end times because I always run my words around people who judge them to make sure, you know, you don't want to just be spouting off stuff without people really listening to them that have a discerning ear. And so I wanted her to really listen to some of the things that the Lord has been sharing with me to see if, you know, you're not getting flaky. You don't want to get flaky. The Lord told me there's too many voices right now. There's too many voices, and there's a lot of them that are listening to familiar spirits. And he said, "Brandon, you must test and judge the spirits. You must test it so that you don't get off." But she's been around people—been around Smith Wigglesworth, two different people, and then she's been around, I mean, Lester Sumrall to Kenneth Hagin to all the greats in my opinion, you know. Mama Jenkins, Sister Wilkerson, there's Rachel Teafatiller, all the greats, and it's such an honor to even be able to talk to her and that she would call and feel the Holy Spirit would have her call, and I just thank God that I have a mother in the faith that would take time to want to help me. I don't take it for granted ever. It is truly an honor, and it's humbling. And he started talking. He said there's a difference between healings and miracles. Healing anointing is—and I even talked to Sister Billye about this—she's talking about healings are the children's bread. Divine health is the children's bread. But miracles are top-notch. Seeing creative miracles—arms growing out, legs, eyes coming back, whatever. Whenever it's not a healing, it's a miracle. It's like a major deal. And the Lord said to me, "We're about to start to see people walk in miracles—creative, walking in miracles, healing autistic children, cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, all of it. I'm talking about supernatural things that no man will get the glory because there's no man that can do it. It's all about Jesus." And I'm telling you all, we're going to see things like we've never seen before. But it's going to happen in a 24-hour window. The switch will come on. And I'm telling you, I talked about this with Sister Billye yesterday about Adam's lease. This is a major milestone, something major. The switch is going to—and you're going to see creative miracles because what was restrained by what was signed by Adam... Even Brother Hagin talked about this, I was told. What was brought by the agreement by Adam in the Garden of Eden, when all the things happened with Adam, was a 6,000-year window. And I'm telling you all, the 6,000-year window is coming to a close. The Lord told me so many times, "Brandon, Adam's lease is up." And within a 24-hour period, you're talking about from night to day. That's how much of a change is about to happen in the body of Christ. You're about to see stuff you never thought you would see—I mean, you always dreamed you would see, but we've never seen it. And the Lord told me, "It's time to get excited. I've looked for this moment longer than what you have." And I'm like, "Yeah, Lord, I bet. Yeah, of course." He said, "I've longed for this moment more than what you can ever—like your mind can't fathom how long I've waited for this moment." Folks, it's time to get excited. And people say, "Well, Brandon, when are you thinking that's going to happen?" I don't know. He told me to watch the time frame in September all the time. Every time we get to the time frame of Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, always watch this time frame, for this is a time of a great holy day, a great change, from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah. This is a time frame of great acceleration, for the birthing pains will triple, double, increase. But now is the time of a push. We're coming to—it's time to push. The baby's coming forth. And I have such an anticipation in my spirit for what's about to happen, for the greatest harvest of souls. And I'm telling you all, a major volcano is about to go off.
